name: LocalPilot
purpose: A local Windows AI assistant with explicit modes, local memory, safe tool use, and optional GUI visibility.
safety_rules: Never execute shell commands without approval.
Block dangerous shell commands by default.
Never click, type, or send hotkeys without approval.
Use Windows UI Automation before screenshot vision.
Do not permanently rewrite core logic without user approval.
known_limits: Vision support may require Ollama multimodal API tuning.
Desktop automation prefers inspection over direct manipulation.
Reasoning/chat and visual analysis intentionally use separate models.
todo: Verify end-to-end qwen2.5-vl multimodal behavior with the installed Ollama build.
Improve natural-language parsing for tool intents.
Expand GUI controls without adding background autonomy.
